textByHashes.da84d53a153f4bf654d9f9cdda3e10059651d00f: Ah! A visitor from a distant land! How can I help?
textByHashes.f5ec789dab590f179bf8139a89aa40d4470cf8e2: It just has that certain ring to it, don't you think? Beeerteeee!
textByHashes.f82351b9b96408e435a89ce090557b9c253d44f8: Are you sure you're ready to take on the dream land?
textByHashes.dbd567d2155a97171b247e2932d1350ffab01276: Well, some people have gone mad from visiting their dreams.
textByHashes.53db76b1ce6606b380a6c80311051988b875668c: You'll need 1 guam leaf, 1 Marrentill leaf and a Suqah tooth ground using a pestle and mortar. Combine these in a vial with water and BAM! You've got your potion! You should be able to get the ingredients from the
textByHashes.b29a6cf66838edd94ddbc7e50b123b243aac229d: You'll also need a special vial, I have one here.
textByHashes.1c55fe21191b756728c58d38310a995f0a73dcc0: I think you shall just have to get used to it on this island.
textByHashes.fb6e9846620e11da74a6e587bef7d8e33970481b: Ah! , I'm glad to see you've returned. How can I help?
textByHashes.8b3990864f69558658644902fe4023cfb1f70edd: Sentences? Sorry it's a force of habit! Mind reading and watnot.
textByHashes.28371e9e63c02db7128787f8863ae9fe5963f67d: Oh don't look at me like that! I'm not the one who exiled you.
textByHashes.9ed5f4c1ea9165633cbce1224ab18e48e61dc754: Those aren't private thoughts! They're nothing compared to the other things I can see...
textByHashes.649b7ab102d83e1c64c4be4fcf7684f35ef205e3: Sure thing! Lunar Glass isn't so hard to make, but I will require a piece of Molten Glass. Return to me when you have some!
textByHashes.1542c123c09084cd2bcb6a3d1bf5b535366af756: Sure thing! Lunar Glass isn't so hard to make, but I will require...
textByHashes.ec24628ab88ecf415b7dd3d49e77ce3b4afddffc: Anyway, let me imbue this piece of glass for you.
textByHashes.edac9a35ed81fa4cc5edc8af91bf553454917d21: You will need to enchant it by using it on the Astral Altar. The process will also require 100 Astral Runes.
textByHashes.2882299f1d5bc94f3ce5306a11399a22fb3bedcd: Afraid not, I have lots of tidying to do around here.
textByHashes.c584b12d420f3d7b978711fb53012650d5ef4af5: Have you ever tried living in a house that's constantly shaking? It's a total nightmare, believe me.
textByHashes.567566980d109c240c9de848060afb7de0a87f00: Lunar Glass? I can do that. I will require a piece of Molten Glass. Return to me when you have some!
textByHashes.bfb4f3db4c39d12e4d0cfd1e91eaaf7bb539bb2b: Lunar Glass? But I can see you already have the Imbued Glass you need! You don't have to be a mind reader to see that...
textByHashes.475231987be54fa7ebf931ff89f8b940476652ce: Remember, you'll need to enchant it by using it on the Astral Altar. This process will also require 100 Astral Runes.
textByHashes.6748c9ec7838bbfa8b4363c4a15d84fd0b51d7c5: Lunar Glass? You'll need some Imbued Glass first. Don't worry, I can make some more for you.
textByHashes.a0eb66fc474fad27b0dfacc32b823557b37b5c42: You don't seem to have any Molten Glass. Come back when you do!
textByHashes.de499dd7013d41ed5a95f12c7bd04965093a9e20: There you go. Remember, you'll need to enchant it by using it on the Astral Altar. This process will also require 100 Astral Runes.
textByHashes.5590aa0ef32d10788557c4f16fc3b9bfa1b36e03: Lunar Glass? But I can see you already have some! You don't have to be a mind reader to see that...
textByHashes.b2153e4331230541696f53fba6980328a8c917d4: Ah, a stranger to our island. How can I help?
textByHashes.38a0bc09f26b83e278f3a5b92572fa551c4b53a0: Help you? Certainly. It's one I've just rediscovered! I can teach it to you if you like, but you have to listen to a story first.
textByHashes.adb7d38b275a5841e5ee63ba34573785f9514122: Well, I was going through some ancient documents recently, expanding my knowledge of our great ancestors...
textByHashes.13c57ea6decb707032cabc4490137a66eb9c0f73: Hmm, actually, I think I had better go further back, so you will understand.
textByHashes.763cf37aaa3b4f5ddeb677bc9c8824e61aa27072: You know of our ancient war with the Fremennik that you recently healed?
textByHashes.5d904349f95a5dead424d8608913fdb93c044ec7: Some diplomat. Did you even discover WHY we were at war for so long?
textByHashes.abc5030478458d4261d4513217347b4bc777cc19: Not too far off; it goes deeper than that.
textByHashes.bafd806b2a2abc02f2f5af91afddc578f7de546e: The Fremennik were actually the first to discover how to make runes, but there was disagreement within the tribe about the implications of making such powerful objects.
textByHashes.533dd1ea20f436acfaa120a9be7ee71c94476905: Most Fremennik felt we were stealing power from the gods. They could not see past that to the great things we could do with such power, so we split from them and became the Moon Clan. Our ancient leader, who first
textByHashes.8565b995f159c5e9ec149a004d5982dc1e4a5155: discovered the rune essence mine here on Lunar Isle, travelled far and wide searching for more places of power. He and his followers built altars all over Gielinor - which you use today to create runes - and at their
textByHashes.e85478749e1c30e0a53fd30523ec22f10a2854b5: height they made runes by the crateful. They had perfected the process and even advanced it, creating altars that could create any type of rune regardless of the crafter's ability. But the strife between the Moon
textByHashes.ede7834eaa1a2be06761fff6b965c8645a6a48ed: Clan and the Fremennik heightened. The Fremennik had grown strong in body, while our clan had grown stong in mind. They overpowered our tribe and we retreated to Lunar Isle, where we had lived ever since.
textByHashes.249b7e2997ade4f2f260ac5e0060bfef1e490964: The Fremennik then swept over Gielinor destroying the altars we had made, in an attempt to remove all trace of magic from the land.
textByHashes.9018aa73f67ac8344b410c7d6d5c1f1bb1879620: The Fremennik were not as thorough as they thought. They destroyed only the entrances to the altars, for the altars themselves were on a different plane, but they were successful in wiping out our ability to create
textByHashes.180663cc424644172efcd60d81410a709322757f: runes. That ability has only recently been rediscovered on the mainland, so I hear.
textByHashes.fb99dfa221d50f054c277f09eb1dc871f673a263: Our people were left isolated on Lunar Isle but we used it to our advantage. Our control over Magic advanced beyond the need for runes and all knowledge of the altar locations passed from memory. Fortunately,
textByHashes.2b2a9648e5bf3044d68e078ff5b83954a46b3dc2: some records survived... The manuscript I discovered contains the teleportation spell to an advanced altar called Ourania. It's an altar that allows the user, regardless of their Runecrafting ability, to craft any
textByHashes.f9cc0252c0d3174492277506187a13f820f742ee: type of rune upon it. Ourania is a powerful altar indeed. What state it is in after so many millennia, I know not, but it's interesting all the same.
textByHashes.f131c341b3ca44fb900ccc47da0ebda7a86c26e7: And now you know the teleportation spell, off with you! Go explore.
textByHashes.872e79551a8b1d5b267e75c82eb80f4ec4fc4aac: I was being polite, silly foreigner.
